seoTitle: Jones Gully vs Jones Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jones Gully and Jones Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jones Gully vs Jones Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jones Gully and Jones Hill.
heading: Jones Gully vs Jones Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jones Gully, Queensland and Jones Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jones Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jones Gully (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jones Gully or Jones Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jones Gully has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Jones Hill scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jones Gully scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Jones Hill scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jones Gully or Jones Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jones Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
